schema.description: Represents token details, only if the user pays with a tokenized card, Ottu will include the token details in the response.

brand.description: The card brand (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) associated with the card. Display this information for customer reference.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier for the customer who owns the card

cvv_required.description: Specifies if the card requires the submission of a CVV for transactions. A card without CVV requirement can be used for auto-debit or recurring payments.

expiry_month.description: The card's expiration month. Provide this information for transaction processing and validation.

expiry_year.description: The card's expiration year. Provide this information for transaction processing and validation.

is_expired.description: A boolean field indicating whether the card has expired. Use this information to determine if the card is valid for transactions and to notify the customer if necessary.

is_preferred.description: Indicates if the card is the customer's preferred payment option. Order cards with this attribute set to true at the top of the list for easy access.

name_on_card.description: The cardholder's name as it appears on the card. Display this information for customer verification.

number.description: The masked card number to be displayed, ensuring customer privacy and security while providing essential information.

pg_code.description: The `pg_code` associated with the card's creation.

pg_name.description:
The payment `gateway` associated with the user's card.

* `knet` - Knet
* `cybersource` - CyberSource
* `csuc` - Cybersource Unified Checkout
* `checkoutcom` - checkout.com
* `migs` - MiGS
* `dapi` - Dapi

* `bambora` - Bambora

token.description: The unique token associated with the card, required for tokenized card payments. Use this value to securely process transactions.

agreements.description: List of agreements associated with this card.

schema.title: Card
